strengths: 20 years of full-stack engineering progression to staff level across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong infrastructure and cloud expertise with AWS, Kubernetes, high-performance systems, and DevOps fundamentals
Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks demonstrates interest alignment and active technical engagement in AI space
concerns: Missing preferred qualification: no Master's or PhD in AI/ML; AI expertise is newly acquired rather than deeply demonstrated
Background is product and infrastructure engineering, not cloud platform strategy or architecture which is central to the role's responsibilities
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers/partners or leading at director-level scope required for a principal engineer role

key_factors.factor: Recent exposure to AI infrastructure work

response.justification: Szabo is an accomplished polyglot engineer with 20 years of progression and strong infrastructure fundamentals. However, he does not meet the specialized profile for a Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy. He lacks the preferred advanced degree in AI/ML, has only recently begun working with AI infrastructure, and shows no background in cloud platform strategy or advising strategic partners—core responsibilities of this director-level role. While his current trajectory is promising, proven AI expertise and strategic leadership experience at scale are required now, not potential.
